title: ventilago madraspatana
intro: Ventilago madraspatana, also known as the Indian Ventilago, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rhamnaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ventilago madraspatana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the leaves and bark of this plant are used to make herbal preparations such as decoctions and infusions, which are used to treat a variety of ailments.
